mapper.select: SELECT symbol, trade_date AS tradeDate, open_price AS openPrice, high_price AS highPrice, low_price AS lowPrice, close_price AS closePrice, volume, source, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM stock_candle_daily WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND trade_date <= #{signalDate} ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM stock_sec_financial_standard WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND fiscal_period = 'FY' AND filed_at IS NOT NULL AND filed_at <= #{asOfDate} ORDER BY end_date DESC, CASE WHEN form IN ('10-K', '10-K/A', '20-F', '20-F/A', '40-F', '40-F/A') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, filed_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM stock_sec_financial_standard WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND fiscal_period = 'FY' AND filed_at IS NOT NULL AND filed_at <= #{asOfDate} AND end_date < #{endDate} ORDER BY end_date DESC, CASE WHEN form IN ('10-K', '10-K/A', '20-F', '20-F/A', '40-F', '40-F/A') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, filed_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM stock_sec_financial_standard WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND fiscal_period IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4') AND filed_at IS NOT NULL AND filed_at <= #{asOfDate} ORDER BY end_date DESC, CASE WHEN assets IS NOT NULL OR equity IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, filed_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM stock_sec_financial_standard WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND fiscal_period IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4') AND filed_at IS NOT NULL AND filed_at <= #{asOfDate} AND end_date < #{endDate} ORDER BY end_date DESC, CASE WHEN assets IS NOT NULL OR equity IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, filed_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT symbol, report_quarter AS reportQuarter, holder_count AS holderCount, total_value_usd_thousands AS totalValueUsdThousands, total_shares AS totalShares, previous_total_value_usd_thousands AS previousTotalValueUsdThousands, previous_total_shares AS previousTotalShares, value_change_pct AS valueChangePct, shares_change_pct AS sharesChangePct, net_shares_change AS netSharesChange, top_manager_name AS topManagerName, top_manager_value_usd_thousands AS topManagerValueUsdThousands, source_filing_count AS sourceFilingCount, mapped_holding_count AS mappedHoldingCount, fetched_at AS fetchedAt FROM stock_institution_flow_quarterly WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND report_quarter <= #{availableQuarterCutoff} ORDER BY report_quarter DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(COALESCE(headline, ''), ' ', COALESCE(summary, ''))) REGEXP 'beat|surge|growth|upgrade|record|profit|strong|positive|approval|contract|partnership' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS positiveCount, SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(CONCAT(COALESCE(headline, ''), ' ', COALESCE(summary, ''))) REGEXP 'miss|risk|lawsuit|probe|recall|downgrade|weak|decline|loss|cut|warning|delay|concern' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS riskCount FROM company_news WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND published_at >= #{fromDateTime} AND published_at < #{toDateTime}
